message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyle fill 200, border 1, borderStyle solid
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyle2 fill 200, border 1, borderStyle solid

class IBaseRepository {
    <<interface>>
    IBaseRepository
}

class BaseRepository {
    <<interface>>
    C BaseRepository
    BaseRepository()
    BaseRepository(context:ApplicationContext)
    <<virtual>> <<async>> Create(obj:T) : Task<T>
    <<virtual>> <<async>> Update(obj:T) : Task<T>
    <<virtual>> <<async>> Update(id:long, obj:T) : Task<T>
    <<virtual>> <<async>> Delete(id:long) : Task<bool>
    <<virtual>> <<async>> Get(id:long?) : Task<T>
    <<virtual>> <<async>> Get() : Task<List<T>>
    EntryExists(id:long) : bool
    <<virtual>> <<async>> IsUniqueValue(obj:T, propertyName:string, value:object) : Task<bool>
    CompareByReflection(objetoASerComparado:object, objetoComparador:object, propertyName:string, value:object) : bool
}

class ApplicationContext {
    <<interface>>
    C ApplicationContext
    ApplicationContext
}

IBaseRepository ..> BaseRepository
BaseRepository ..> ApplicationContext

BaseRepository ..> ApplicationContext
@enduml
